title: Investigate the one live meta lead: momentum_zscore+xgb fold0 (hit 0.51, MCC 0.20, +2.14 Sharpe)
why: Across the whole XAU D1 line this is the ONLY place the meta shows genuine discrimination (hit ratio 0.51 vs ~0.22 base rate, MCC 0.20) rather than near-zero. Worth understanding before any broad tuning: is it real signal or one-fold luck?
value_rationale: The single most promising thread for the meta actually adding value; high signal-to-effort.
scope: Read mda_per_fold.json for momentum_zscore xgb fold0 — which features drive the discrimination
Check whether the effect survives outside fold0 (other folds, other models) or is isolated
Sanity vs lookahead: confirm the driving features are not leaking (publication-lag, purge/embargo intact)
Decide if it warrants a focused config/feature variant or is a statistical fluke (1 fold, 90 trades)

history.reason: the one live meta lead worth chasing
